title: Combat Companion
description: A persistent tactical HUD for D&D 5e – action economy, ability scores, skills, conditions, reactions list, spells with slots, weapon attacks, saving throws, features & abilities, and more. v1.5.6: fix dnd5e v4 activity damage extraction, remove deprecated getAttackToHit, fix filter re-render with stale data, new sidebar.html template, add LICENSE, README fix.
